message.content:
@startuml
participant : Teacher as Teacher
participant : UpdateRollCallForm as UpdateRollCallForm
participant : StudentController as StudentController
participant : RollCall as RollCall
participant : ClassroomMember as ClassroomMember

actor : Teacher
participant : UpdateRollCallForm
participant : StudentController
participant : RollCall
participant : ClassroomMember

Teacher -> UpdateRollCallForm: 1 // request update roll call
UpdateRollCallForm -> StudentController: 2 // request update roll call
StudentController -> RollCall: 3 // checking information is valid

alt [information is valid]
    RollCall -> StudentController: 5 // Information is valid
    StudentController -> RollCall: 6 // Request make roll call
    RollCall -> UpdateRollCallForm: 8 // Roll call update done
    UpdateRollCallForm -> Teacher: 9 // Roll call done
    alt [information is not valid]
        RollCall -> StudentController: 5.1 // Information is not valid
        StudentController -> UpdateRollCallForm: 5.2 // Roll call update failed
        UpdateRollCallForm -> Teacher: 5.3 // Roll call failed, check information again
    end
end

@enduml
